uplink.description: Climate report (type 0x0C): temperature + humidity, wind-speed channel absent
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3, Temperature 23.45, Humidity 55, WindSpeed NoSensor) and normalizing: Temperature->air.temperature, Humidity->air.relativeHumidity, Volt->battery; NoSensor channel omitted.

uplink.description: Climate report (type 0x0C): negative temperature, humidity, and wind speed all present
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.6, Temperature -5.5, Humidity 80, WindSpeed 3.2) and normalizing: WindSpeed->wind.speed (m/s). Temperature is 16-bit two's-complement (0xFDDA = -550 -> -5.50 C).

uplink.description: Air-quality report (type 0x07): CO2 only, NH3 and noise channels absent
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3, CO2 800, NH3 NoSensor, Noise NoSensor) and normalizing: CO2 (channel/10 ppm) -> air.co2; NoSensor channels omitted.

uplink.description: Air-quality report (type 0x07): CO2 + NH3 + noise with low-battery flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt '3(low battery)', CO2 450, NH3 12.5, Noise 60). byte3 high bit (0x9E) -> lowBattery extra + battery (0x1E/10 = 3 V); CO2->air.co2; NH3/Noise are camelCase extras the vocabulary does not model.

uplink.description: Startup version report carries no measurement (report type 0x00)
Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported (no measurement)
